paper_focus.title: Data-driven and multi-mechanism strengthening based yield strength prediction in medium-manganese low-density steels
paper_focus.research_objective: To overcome the limitations of traditional linear superposition models by developing a data-driven framework that accurately predicts yield strength in medium-manganese low-density steels through the coupled contributions of solid solution, grain refinement, dislocation, and Orowan strengthening mechanisms.
expected_information_axis: strengthening mechanism contributions (solid solution, grain refinement, dislocation, Orowan)
figure evidence (SHAP summary plot, feature importance bar, response diagram)
